name: Röteli liqueur factory tour at Christoffel Rötali in Davos
description: Discover Röteli liqueur factory tour at Christoffel Rötali in Davos in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Röteli liqueur factory tour at Christoffel Rötali in Davos in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Distillery
subcategory.description: A visit to a distillery will give you an exciting insight into the art of making spirits. During a guided tour, you will get to know the various production areas. A knowledgeable member of staff will explain the process of making spirits from start to finish. You will learn which raw materials and ingredients are used to produce the spirits and what is involved in the distillation process. A highlight of the visit is the tasting of the distillery's products, where you will get to know their aromas, flavors and nuances under expert guidance.
